gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands confidently, opens both arms wide to welcome students, explaining multiplication enthusiastically
the tutor points forward while nodding, encouraging students to visualize the problem with 3 bags and 4 apples
the teacher leans slightly forward, extending the left hand and counting on fingers, asking the multiplication question
the tutor stands tall, raises both hands slightly as if lifting a weight, emphasizing the final question with enthusiasm
the teacher shifts weight to one side, opens the right hand invitingly while describing multiplication groups clearly
the tutor rhythmically raises both hands, counting groups as they introduce the new problem about oranges
the tutor points forward with the right hand, inviting students to recall the original multiplication problem once more
